ReleaseNotes: Epi-Link is now hidden from the normal clinical workflow by default. The Epi-Link review toggle, the epithelial-thickness view, the Epi-Link preview step and the topography "Epi." column no longer appear unless the feature is enabled. A switch in Engineering Mode turns it on, and the choice is remembered between sessions.
Restricted audit-trail access: the audit log can no longer be opened from the database screen; it is now available only from Engineering Mode.

Corrected thickness label on the Calculation Summary: the manual thickness adjustment is now labelled to match the treatment mode — "Flap Thickness" (LASIK), "PRK Adjustment" (PRK) or "Transepi Ablation" (TransEpi) — consistent with the ablation result panel and the report.
Reliability and internal improvements to treatment planning.
